title: KubeCon + CloudNativeCon Call for Proposals
description: KubeCon + CloudNativeCon Call for Proposals is a professional or community conference with an open call for speakers and participant networking administered by Cloud Native Computing Foundation.
eligibility: Applicants must meet the current event, role, age, location, deadline, and program-specific requirements.
value: A public speaking pathway, audience reach, peer exchange, and conference networking
